description: You are a Clinical Nurse Specialist preparing a patient education guide on Congestive Heart Failure. Format the draft document at /home/ga/Documents/heart_failure_guide.odt in Calligra Words according to the hospital print shop specifications found in /home/ga/Desktop/print_shop_specs.txt. Ensure the page layout, typography, and structural elements (headings, list, table, italics) meet all requirements for a tri-fold brochure. Save the finished document as /home/ga/Documents/heart_failure_brochure_print.odt.

metadata.title: Living with Heart Failure: Patient Guide
